subject: ASAP: Backend Engineer – Rust
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Vaultix
ROLE: Lead Backend Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 1075 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Rust, GCP and MySQL.

Key requirements:

  • Rust
  • GCP
  • MySQL

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
